docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,928.70 FILED BY SYNERTEL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST BUSINESS COMMUNICATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO DAVID BELL PRESIDENT SOUTH- WEST BUSINESS COMMUNICATION RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNERTEL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST BUSINESS COMMUNICATION $1,928.70 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,949.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST BUSINESS COMMUNICATION
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,949.70 AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST BUSINESS COMMUNICATION
